settings.title: No Water Shipped
settings.desc: Concentrated formula means zero water shipped in every bottle.

settings.title: Naturally Gentle
settings.desc: Safe for skin and earth. No harsh chemicals, ever.

settings.title: Recycled Plastic Only
settings.desc: Thoughtfully repurposed for a cleaner tomorrow.

settings.heading: Premium doesn't have to mean pretentious. It can mean purposeful.
settings.text: Care doesn't have to cost the world. It can heal it. We create concentrated cleaning that works, shipping no water, and using strictly recycled materials.
